reviews.review_msg: He's fairly new at teaching and his accent makes it difficult to understand what he's talking about at times. He's clearly educated and knows what he's talking about but can get very wordy in his explanations. Tests were very long, averages around 50% over 4 midterms. Don't take this class unless you want to read a new book every 3 weeks

His accent makes it hard to understand him but I don't doubt his knowledge of the material. His midterm was fair and so was the take home final. Attendance of lecture is not that mandatory since I didn't go for 4 straight weeks and still managed a B+. This is due to the fact that the lectures are out of the textbook.
